notes: Enter in #drawSearch fires searchDraw: geocoded Versailles KY, drawMap recentered z19 (verified center delta + zoom).
GO button fires searchDraw: geocoded Frankfort KY, recentered z19.
My Location (goToMyLocation): geoloc -> 'Moved to your location' toast, drawMap recentered to rep position.

All 4 draw-mode buttons switch drawMode (line/perim/er/gutter) via real clicks: ltGrid shows in line, hides + perimBar/erBar/gutterResult reveal in the others; active class moves; setDrawMode auto-stops draw on switch.
Exit Eave/Rake (modeLineDraw): er -> line, erBar hidden, ltGrid back.

perimChooseType eave/rake: reChooser ('THIS SEGMENT IS A...') reveals after the first perimeter point; clicking EAVE(solid)/RAKE(dashed) tags the segment and lets the next point be placed. Drove a full 4-corner perimeter -> Facet 1 closed (6469 sf), line types stored (2/5/4/5 = hip/eave/wall/eave).
Line Type grid (selLT): clicking Hip moves active class + sets active line type/color; next drawn line stored as type 2 (Hip), 93.1 ft. ltGrid correctly hidden in perim/er/gutter modes.
Draw toggle: drawOn flips, btn text Draw<->Stop, crosshair cursor on. Map clicks add measurement points only while ON; two clicks = one line with live ft measurement (93 ft).
Undo: 2 drawn lines -> 1 (deleteLine on last). Also pops perim/gutter dots when in those modes.
Clear: native confirm 'Clear all lines and facets?' (nbdConfirm/confirm gate) -> on OK all lines+facets+dots+temp removed, cr-base back to 0 sf, lineList emptied. Danger gate present and honored.

Pitch select (data-on-change=recalc): recalc reads pitchSel.value as the global multiplier (Flat 1.0 .. 12/12). NOTE: in a MULTI-FACET drawing the per-facet pitch dropdown dominates (recalc sums per-facet pitch when facets.length>0), so changing the GLOBAL pitchSel shows no delta until facets are removed — by design, but the global control looks inert on multi-facet roofs. Single-facet/line drawings honor it.
Waste select (data-on-change=recalc): changing 17%->20% recomputed With-Waste (9097->9331 sf) and Squares; restored to 17%. Waste multiplier always applied regardless of facets.

Smart Waste (AI): computed 'Smart: 14% (Moderate)', inserted as a wasteSel option + selected it, recomputed With-Waste to 8825 sf, showed smartWasteInfo ('14% waste — Moderate roof (1 hip, tight angles)') + toast. Local heuristic (calcSmartWaste), no network.

Generate Estimate (importToEstimate): confirm dialog lists pitched/footprint/eave/ridge/rake/hip/valley/wall; OK -> V2 builder opens with rawSqft=PITCHED area + LF fields (verified clean: 6000 SF / 120 eave / 80 ridge with no draft). NOTE pitched (not footprint) is sent per the in-code fix comment. BUG NEW-D39 found (see BUG-LOG): when a v2 draft already exists, openEstimateV2Builder's draft-restore overrides the imported measurements -> first run showed the stale draft's 200 SF / 'ZZ_QA ServerPDF Test' customer despite the dialog saying 7776 SF; the 'imported' toast still fires. Cleared the stale + re-created drafts after.

Save to Customer: empty-address guard ('Enter an address first') fires; with an address, no-match -> nbdConfirm 'Save as an unlinked drawing?' boundary (declined). Found the doc-viewer 'Close without saving?' confirm wired correctly (must return true) per tooling note. Did not persist (boundary).

Load from Customer: empty-address guard fires; with an address it queries leads/{id}/drawings ordered by version. Live result: 'Load failed: Missing or insufficient permissions' (FirebaseError) — the drawings subcollection has no read rule for this owner. Logged as NEW-D40-a (rules gap; non-blocking, feature simply can't load saved drawings). Button + flow work; backend denies.
Measurement Report (exportDrawReport): opens NBDDocViewer srcdoc (5069 chars, 'Roof Measurement Report', no freeze/block) with the full Save/Email/Print/Download/Send-for-Signature bar. Closed clean.
Scope of Work (generateScopeFromDrawing): NBDDocViewer srcdoc 5647 chars, title 'Scope of Work — Property Address'. Closed clean.

Material Takeoff (showMaterialTakeoff): NBDDocViewer srcdoc 4424 chars, branded 'Material Takeoff' with squares/smart-waste/material-list table. (Note: the viewer overlay is z-index 10000 fullscreen — left open it occludes the whole sidebar; always close it before the next control.)

Xactimate Export (ESX): generated a blob download 'NBD-Xactimate-Property-2026-06-10.esx' (verified via anchor-click spy, file suppressed) + 'Xactimate ESX file downloaded' toast. ESX XML built from grouped line types.

Solar Analysis (runSolarAnalysis): 'Running solar analysis...' -> on-map solar marker 'Est. 2078 hrs/yr · Lat 38.1°' + toast prompting Google Solar API key for precise data. Local fallback estimate (no key) works.
Add Structure: 'Added: Structure 1' toast, structureList row '🏠 STRUCTURE 1 ✏️' added. In-memory (no persistence).
Layer toggle (toggleMapLayer): cycles basemap Satellite -> Street(OSM) -> Satellite (verified by inspecting attached TileLayer _url across clicks). Label updates SATELLITE/STREET.
Fit All (zoomToFit): map recentered onto the drawing bounds (center matched facet bounds center, z21).
Screenshot (screenshotMap): 'Capturing map...' -> blob PNG download 'nbd-drawing.png' (spy-captured, suppressed) + 'Screenshot saved!' toast.
Angles (showAngles): overlaid interior-angle labels at each vertex (8 x '90°' on the rectangular facet).

Shadow Pitch (startShadowPitch): shadowMode entered, shadowBar 'Step 1: Click two points along the roof shadow'; clicked 2 shadow pts -> 'Shadow: 12.4 ft — Step 2: draw roof edge' -> drew edge -> computed but returned 'Sun too low for reliable pitch estimation' (valid edge-case result, not an error). Full 2-step flow works.

Auto-Detect (startAutoDetect): 'Click a corner — AI will trace edges' -> clicked a roof corner -> 'Analyzing satellite imagery...' -> 'Could not detect clear edges' (graceful no-result; tried on a real building too). Flow + AI call fire; detection is best-effort.

Voice (toggleVoiceControl): ON -> btn '🎙️ Listening...', voice-active class, 'Voice control ON — say commands like ridge 48 feet' toast; OFF -> '🎤 Voice', 'Voice control OFF'. (SpeechRecognition starts; mic granted.)
History (toggleHistoricalImagery): historyPanel reveals with date+opacity sliders; 'Historical imagery loaded' toast; a historical tile layer attaches (tileLayers 1->2).

Present (startPresentation): presentOverlay launches a 5-slide homeowner deck (slide 1 'Satellite aerial measurement' with property address title + map fly-to, slide 2 'ROOF OUTLINE — 2 roof sections, 6469 base sf'); Back/Next/✕ all work; closed clean.
Compare (openComparisonMode): comparisonModal opens 'Measurement Comparison — upload EagleView/RoofScope report'; close + drop-zone verified below.
Historical date slider (setHistoricalLayer): moving it changed the displayed date label (2017-09-20 -> 2018-02-14) and swapped the historical layer.
Historical opacity slider (updateHistoryOpacity): set 0.5 -> Opacity label '50%' updated.
Close historical (closeHistoricalImagery): ✕ hides historyPanel + removes the historical tile layer (tileLayers back to 1).

Accept Edges: autoDetectBar with Accept/Cancel only appears AFTER a successful AI edge detection; live detection returned 'Could not detect clear edges' on multiple corners (forest + real building), so the bar never revealed. Accept path unreachable without a detectable roof in current imagery. Structurally wired (acceptAutoDetect commits detected lines).
Cancel (auto-detect): same as 070 — autoDetectBar never revealed (no successful detection). Wired (cancelAutoDetect discards).
Draw Tools sidebar toggle (map-sidebar-draw): display:none at desktop width (mobile-reflow control) — retest in the 390px mobile pass.
Comparison drop-zone (clickProxy -> #compFile.click): clicking the drop area proxied to the hidden file input (spy caught 1 .click() call; native picker suppressed).
Comparison file input (handleComparisonFile): requires a real EagleView/RoofScope PDF/CSV upload through the native picker — device/file pass. Wired via data-on-change.
Cancel/✕ comparison (closeComparisonMode): dismissed comparisonModal cleanly.
